functions.title: Guide Book #30
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #30§r
§lCopper Evaporator§r
§8BLOCK§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lFound naturally§r: NO
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lBlast Resistance§r: 30.0
•§lHardness§r: 3.0

•§lFlammable§r: NO
•§lMining Tool§r: Pickaxe
•§lDrops on breaking§r: Copper Evaporator
•§lContainable with§r: Water, Snow, Ices, Lava, Milk, Mud, Rotten Flesh.
•The copper evaporator can dry out the contained substances in a few minutes.
•The water, milk, snow, ice, or rotten flesh contained will dry out after 100 seconds §o§8(1:40)§r. While the lava contained will dry out after 200 seconds §o§8(3:20)§r.§’
